message:
feat(fcp-graphql): add typed GraphQL client infrastructure crate

Introduce fcp-graphql crate providing typed GraphQL client infrastructure
for FCP connectors with comprehensive features.

Core capabilities:
- GraphqlClient with builder pattern for configuration
- Schema-aware validation modes (strict, lenient, disabled)
- Request/response operation types with proper error handling
- GraphQL error taxonomy mapping to FCP error codes

Pagination support:
- Cursor-based pagination with CursorPage/CursorPageInfo
- Offset-based pagination with OffsetPage
- Generic pagination helpers (paginate_cursor, paginate_offset)

Reliability features:
- Configurable retry policies with backoff strategies
- RetryDecision enum for fine-grained control
- Metrics collection for observability

Real-time support:
- GraphQL over WebSocket subscriptions
- GraphqlSubscriptionStream for async iteration
- Configurable subscription client

Workspace integration:
- Added to workspace members and default-members
- Added internal workspace dependency reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
